# CMakeLists.txt for concurrentqueue (source build - header only)
# This file is a placeholder.
# For header-only libraries like concurrentqueue, this CMakeLists.txt might not be
# strictly necessary if WazuhExternalDependencies.cmake directly sets up an INTERFACE library
# target with the correct include paths.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project(wazuh_ext_concurrentqueue NONE)

message(STATUS "This CMakeLists.txt (src/engine/external/concurrentqueue/CMakeLists.txt) is a placeholder. ConcurrentQueue is header-only.")
